Assembly: The assembly jaAcrLori1.hap2.1 is based on 166x PacBio data and Arima2 Hi-C data generated by the Aquatic Symbiosis Genomics Project (https://www.aquaticsymbiosisgenomics.org/). The assembly process included the following sequence of steps: initial PacBio assembly generation with Hifiasm in Hi-C integrated assembly mode, and Hi-C based scaffolding with YaHS. The mitochondrial genome was assembled using MitoHiFi and OATK. Finally, each haplotype assembly was analysed and manually improved using TreeVal. Chromosome-scale scaffolds confirmed by the Hi-C data have been named in order of size.
